positive: A vibrant, symmetrical stylized celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) meditating amidst glowing geometric constellations and ethereal floral elements. The fox has a sleek, confident silhouette, adopting a dynamic yet centered pose. Use a limited, jewel-toned color palette (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple, gold leaf accents) for high contrast and deep saturation. The composition should be highly detailed and ornamental, designed for a seamless circular or square repeat print. Intricate line work, minimalist shading, maximalist pattern depth, mystical, Art Nouveau meets modern sacred geometry style. Clean vector aesthetic, graphic novel illustration quality, suitable for apparel screen printing, solid background areas to prevent bleeding.
